name: Londax Corp.
business: Londax Corp. provides IT consulting services and software development solutions. Its flagship product Londax.ai is a Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System with Applicant Tracking and out-staffing services. The company targets small to midsize businesses and intends to operate in Europe with potential worldwide operations.

exposures.sentence: Our company develop and implement a customized Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System that facilitates out-staffing for our future clients.
For the Artificial Intelligence functionality (advertisement generation), the OpenAI API is used.
londax.ai is a web application consisting of Frontend and Backend components hosted on cloud services provided by AWS.
